briefdescription.para: Initializes the Gamma LUT core instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes the Gamma LUT core by setting up the instance configuration structure and marking the instance as ready.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is a pointer to the configuration structure.
is the base address of the device.

detaileddescription.para: This function starts the Gamma LUT core by setting the AP_START bit in the control register while preserving the auto-restart setting.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the Gamma LUT core has finished processing.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the AP_DONE bit in the control register to determine if the core has finished processing the current frame.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the Gamma LUT core is idle.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the AP_IDLE bit in the control register to determine if the core is idle and not processing any data.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

briefdescription.para: Checks if the Gamma LUT core is ready for next input.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks if the core is ready to accept new input by verifying the AP_START bit is not set.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the auto-restart feature, which allows the core to automatically restart processing after completion.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the auto-restart feature, requiring manual restart after each frame processing completion.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the width value to the hardware width register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the width value to set.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the width value from the hardware width register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the height value to the hardware height register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the height value to set.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the height value from the hardware height register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

briefdescription.para: Sets the video format register value.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes the video format value to the hardware video format register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the video format value to set.

briefdescription.para: Gets the video format register value.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the video format value from the hardware video format register.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

briefdescription.para: Gets the base address of gamma LUT 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the base address of the gamma LUT 0 memory region.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

simplesect.para: The base address of gamma LUT 0

briefdescription.para: Gets the high address of gamma LUT 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the high address of the gamma LUT 0 memory region.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

simplesect.para: The high address of gamma LUT 0

briefdescription.para: Gets the total bytes of gamma LUT 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function calculates and returns the total size in bytes of the gamma LUT 0 memory region.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

simplesect.para: The total bytes of gamma LUT 0

briefdescription.para: Gets the bit width of gamma LUT 0 entries.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the bit width of each entry in gamma LUT 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

simplesect.para: The bit width of gamma LUT 0 entries

briefdescription.para: Gets the depth of gamma LUT 0.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the depth (number of entries) of gamma LUT 0.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes multiple 32-bit words to gamma LUT 0 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the word offset to start writing.
is a pointer to the data array to write.
is the number of words to write.

simplesect.para: The number of words written, or 0 if offset+length exceeds bounds

detaileddescription.para: This function reads multiple 32-bit words from gamma LUT 0 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the word offset to start reading.
is a pointer to the data array to store read values.
is the number of words to read.

simplesect.para: The number of words read, or 0 if offset+length exceeds bounds

detaileddescription.para: This function writes multiple bytes to gamma LUT 0 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the byte offset to start writing.
is a pointer to the data array to write.
is the number of bytes to write.

simplesect.para: The number of bytes written, or 0 if offset+length exceeds bounds

detaileddescription.para: This function reads multiple bytes from gamma LUT 0 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the byte offset to start reading.
is a pointer to the data array to store read values.
is the number of bytes to read.

simplesect.para: The number of bytes read, or 0 if offset+length exceeds bounds

briefdescription.para: Gets the base address of gamma LUT 1.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the base address of the gamma LUT 1 memory region.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

simplesect.para: The base address of gamma LUT 1

briefdescription.para: Gets the high address of gamma LUT 1.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the high address of the gamma LUT 1 memory region.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

simplesect.para: The high address of gamma LUT 1

briefdescription.para: Gets the total bytes of gamma LUT 1.

detaileddescription.para: This function calculates and returns the total size in bytes of the gamma LUT 1 memory region.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

simplesect.para: The total bytes of gamma LUT 1

briefdescription.para: Gets the bit width of gamma LUT 1 entries.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the bit width of each entry in gamma LUT 1.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

simplesect.para: The bit width of gamma LUT 1 entries

briefdescription.para: Gets the depth of gamma LUT 1.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the depth (number of entries) of gamma LUT 1.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes multiple 32-bit words to gamma LUT 1 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the word offset to start writing.
is a pointer to the data array to write.
is the number of words to write.

simplesect.para: The number of words written, or 0 if offset+length exceeds bounds

detaileddescription.para: This function reads multiple 32-bit words from gamma LUT 1 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the word offset to start reading.
is a pointer to the data array to store read values.
is the number of words to read.

simplesect.para: The number of words read, or 0 if offset+length exceeds bounds

detaileddescription.para: This function writes multiple bytes to gamma LUT 1 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the byte offset to start writing.
is a pointer to the data array to write.
is the number of bytes to write.

simplesect.para: The number of bytes written, or 0 if offset+length exceeds bounds

detaileddescription.para: This function reads multiple bytes from gamma LUT 1 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the byte offset to start reading.
is a pointer to the data array to store read values.
is the number of bytes to read.

simplesect.para: The number of bytes read, or 0 if offset+length exceeds bounds

briefdescription.para: Gets the base address of gamma LUT 2.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the base address of the gamma LUT 2 memory region.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

simplesect.para: The base address of gamma LUT 2

briefdescription.para: Gets the high address of gamma LUT 2.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the high address of the gamma LUT 2 memory region.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

simplesect.para: The high address of gamma LUT 2

briefdescription.para: Gets the total bytes of gamma LUT 2.

detaileddescription.para: This function calculates and returns the total size in bytes of the gamma LUT 2 memory region.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

simplesect.para: The total bytes of gamma LUT 2

briefdescription.para: Gets the bit width of gamma LUT 2 entries.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the bit width of each entry in gamma LUT 2.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

simplesect.para: The bit width of gamma LUT 2 entries

briefdescription.para: Gets the depth of gamma LUT 2.

detaileddescription.para: This function returns the depth (number of entries) of gamma LUT 2.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function writes multiple 32-bit words to gamma LUT 2 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the word offset to start writing.
is a pointer to the data array to write.
is the number of words to write.

simplesect.para: The number of words written, or 0 if offset+length exceeds bounds

detaileddescription.para: This function reads multiple 32-bit words from gamma LUT 2 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the word offset to start reading.
is a pointer to the data array to store read values.
is the number of words to read.

simplesect.para: The number of words read, or 0 if offset+length exceeds bounds

detaileddescription.para: This function writes multiple bytes to gamma LUT 2 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the byte offset to start writing.
is a pointer to the data array to write.
is the number of bytes to write.

simplesect.para: The number of bytes written, or 0 if offset+length exceeds bounds

detaileddescription.para: This function reads multiple bytes from gamma LUT 2 starting at the specified offset.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the byte offset to start reading.
is a pointer to the data array to store read values.
is the number of bytes to read.

simplesect.para: The number of bytes read, or 0 if offset+length exceeds bounds

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the global interrupt output by setting the GIE (Global Interrupt Enable) bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the global interrupt output by clearing the GIE (Global Interrupt Enable) bit.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables individual interrupts specified by the Mask parameter in the Interrupt Enable Register (IER).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the bit mask of interrupts to enable.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables individual interrupts specified by the Mask parameter in the Interrupt Enable Register (IER).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the bit mask of interrupts to disable.

detaileddescription.para: This function clears pending interrupts specified by the Mask parameter in the Interrupt Status Register (ISR).

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
is the bit mask of interrupts to clear.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the Interrupt Enable Register (IER) value, indicating which interrupts are currently enabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the Interrupt Status Register (ISR) value, indicating which interrupts are currently pending.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XV_gamma_lut instance.
